artifact_classes.name: Identity and authority
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that identify actors, issuers, delegated roles, and related trust-bearing entities.

artifact_classes.name: Governance and policy
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that express ecosystem rules, policy references, and framework semantics.

artifacts.name: Assurance level definitions
artifacts.notes: Normative prose source for AL semantics.

artifact_classes.name: Assurance and conformance
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that express trust posture, implementation claims, and evaluable declarations.

artifacts.name: A2A-bound trust artifact notes
artifacts.notes: Documents reusable trust-artifact patterns exposed by domain-specific A2A bindings such as ANAB-over-A2A.

artifacts.name: OASF publication profile schema
artifacts.notes: Canonical shared publication shape for OASF-described subjects and declaration references.

artifacts.name: OASF evaluation envelope schema
artifacts.notes: Canonical shared evaluator result shape for OASF-described subjects.

artifact_classes.name: Controls and mappings
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that define controls, obligations, and assurance mappings.

artifacts.name: OASF control crosswalk
artifacts.notes: Cross-repo control mapping pattern for OASF, ANAB, DCAS, and TSMM bindings.

artifact_classes.name: Registry and ecosystem state
artifact_classes.description: Artifacts that express current ecosystem state, membership, and indexable trust facts.

artifacts.name: OASF-aware registry references
artifacts.notes: Registry entries may now carry OASF publication, evidence, evaluation, and semantic-binding references.
